_comment: Top social posts to feature in the stats report. Add one object per post to `posts` (keys starting with _ are ignored). `stats` is free-form — include whatever metrics the platform reports (impressions, reactions/likes, comments/replies, reposts/shares, etc.); missing ones are just omitted. The report section (added later) can order by any stat or by the array order here.

_example.author: Steve Wilson
_example.title: First line / short description of the post

posts.author: Steve Wilson
posts.title: The Scanner, the SOC Agent, and the Prompt That Lied

posts.author: Steve Wilson
posts.title: Do you know what your agents are up to?

posts.author: Joanne Pei Lee Wong
posts.title: Frontier AI Is Changing Cyber Risk. Agent Behavior Verification Needs to Be Part of the Response.
posts._note: Community post (not ours) — only public reactions/reposts visible; impressions/views unavailable.
